notes: Target state for Google Business Profile (Maps) — apply in GBP UI or via official GBP API after OAuth. This file is not sent to Google automatically.

onlineAppointments.implementationHint: Link to /contact or trusted booking URL; match website CTA.

onlineEstimates.implementationHint: Use if you offer scoped quotes; align wording with /pricing.

virtualOrRemoteServices.implementationHint: Primary delivery is remote; list regions served (global online).

appointmentRequired.implementationHint: Studio cadence is concierge-led; avoids walk-in mismatch.

primaryCategories.notes: Pick the closest GBP taxonomy; avoid unrelated categories for E-E-A-T.

serviceArea.notes: If you also serve a city, add without removing online positioning.

crossChannelConsistency.descriptionAlignment: Match tone: premium, ATS-safe, bilingual EN/FR, concierge — no hype claims.
crossChannelConsistency.socialBios: NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_* URLs should match GBP 'Website' and same brand strings.

antiLeak.storeIn: Render/Railway environment or Google Secret Manager only
